articles.title: FDA Caught Red-Handed: Senator Exposes Agency Cover-Up of COVID Vaccine Child Deaths
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson accuses the FDA of systematically concealing COVID vaccine injuries in what he calls 'the largest government scandal in my lifetime.' The agency buried adverse event data while pushing vaccines on children despite mounting evidence of harm.

articles.title: Elsevier Bows to Pharma Pressure: SIDS-Vaccine Study Retracted Despite Valid Science
articles.summary: Publisher Elsevier retracted Neil Z. Miller's 2021 study linking sudden infant death syndrome to vaccines, citing vague concerns about 'patient care.' The retraction follows the playbook of silencing vaccine safety research that threatens industry profits.

articles.title: The Great SSRI Lie: How Big Pharma Manufactured the Serotonin Depression Myth
articles.summary: A comprehensive exposé reveals how pharmaceutical companies fabricated the serotonin deficiency theory of depression in the 1980s to sell SSRIs. A 2022 University College London meta-analysis found 'no consistent evidence' supporting this billion-dollar lie.

articles.title: FDA's Deadly Cover-Up: Internal Documents Expose Systematic Concealment of Pediatric Vaccine Deaths
articles.summary: Investigative reporting by Maryanne Demasi reveals the FDA's deliberate suppression of child death data linked to COVID vaccines. Internal agency communications show systematic efforts to hide adverse events while promoting vaccination to children.

articles.title: Brain Aging Reversed With Simple Nasal Spray — But Will Big Pharma Bury This Breakthrough?
articles.summary: Texas A&M researchers developed a nasal spray that reverses brain aging by calming inflammation and restoring energy systems. Two doses improved memory for months, but this cheap intervention threatens the pharmaceutical industry's profitable Alzheimer's pipeline.

articles.title: Medical Establishment Admits Crisis: External Validation Reveals Widespread Study Fraud
articles.summary: Nature publishes damning perspective on neuroimaging studies, promoting external validation using independent datasets. The admission reveals decades of irreproducible research that has misled patients and wasted billions in healthcare spending.

articles.title: Medical Overtreatment Epidemic: Industry Suppresses 'Less Is More' Evidence
articles.summary: Brownstone Institute analysis exposes how the medical establishment systematically ignores evidence favoring conservative treatment approaches. The healthcare industry profits from overtreatment while suppressing studies showing better outcomes with minimal intervention.

articles.title: IVF Industry Boom Built on Medical Negligence: Doctor Exposes Fertility Treatment Scam
articles.summary: IVF specialist Brian Levine reveals how ob-gyns deliberately avoid proper fertility education because insurance won't pay for it. The $8 billion fertility industry profits from manufactured infertility while basic reproductive health education is systematically suppressed.

articles.title: FDA Buried Child Deaths from COVID Vaccines — Internal Documents Expose Systematic Cover-Up
articles.summary: The FDA actively concealed deaths of children linked to COVID vaccines, according to internal documents analyzed by investigative reporters. The agency manipulated safety data and suppressed adverse event reports to maintain public confidence in the vaccination program.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes FDA's COVID Vaccine Injury Cover-Up — Calls It 'Largest Government Scandal'
articles.summary: Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson directly accused the FDA of concealing COVID vaccine injuries in what he termed the largest government scandal of his lifetime. The agency systematically buried adverse event data while promoting vaccine safety to the public.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Serotonin Lie Exposed — Depression Theory Was Marketing Fiction, Not Science
articles.summary: The serotonin deficiency theory of depression was manufactured by pharmaceutical companies in the 1980s to sell SSRIs, not discovered through research. A 2022 University College London meta-analysis found zero consistent evidence for the chemical imbalance theory that made Big Pharma billions.

articles.title: Elsevier Retracts SIDS-Vaccine Study After Industry Pressure — Science Censorship in Real Time
articles.summary: Publishing giant Elsevier caved to pharmaceutical pressure and retracted Neil Miller's peer-reviewed study linking sudden infant death syndrome to vaccinations. The retraction cited concerns the paper 'might influence patient care' — revealing that protecting industry interests trumps scientific inquiry.

articles.title: Peppermint Oil Crushes Blood Pressure Drugs in Clinical Trial — Big Pharma Loses $50 Billion Market
articles.summary: A UK clinical trial found daily peppermint oil reduced systolic blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg, matching or exceeding expensive pharmaceuticals. The natural treatment threatens the massive antihypertensive drug market, explaining why this research gets buried while side-effect-laden medications get promoted.

articles.title: Nasal Spray Reverses Brain Aging in Days — Texas Researchers Bypass Big Pharma's Alzheimer's Racket
articles.summary: Texas A&M scientists developed a simple nasal spray that reverses brain aging by targeting inflammation and energy systems, showing dramatic cognitive improvements after just two doses. This breakthrough threatens the billion-dollar Alzheimer's drug industry built on failed amyloid theories.

articles.title: ImmunityBio Caught in $2 Billion Cancer Fraud — FDA Finally Acts After Years of Misleading Claims
articles.summary: Biotech company ImmunityBio faces securities fraud lawsuits after the FDA flagged misleading cancer treatment claims, wiping out $2 billion in market value. The case exposes how biotech companies routinely exaggerate clinical results while regulators look the other way.

articles.title: External Validation Crisis Exposed — Neuroimaging Studies Fail When Actually Tested
articles.summary: Nature publishes damning perspective showing neuroimaging studies routinely fail external validation, revealing the replication crisis in brain research. Most published findings collapse when tested on independent datasets, but journals and institutions continue promoting unreproducible science.

articles.title: Texas A&M Scientists Develop Nasal Spray That Reverses Brain Aging — Big Pharma's Alzheimer's Goldmine Threatened
articles.summary: Researchers achieved months-long cognitive improvement with just two nasal spray doses targeting brain inflammation and energy systems. This simple, likely inexpensive intervention bypasses the pharmaceutical industry's failed billion-dollar Alzheimer's drug development entirely. Watch for suppression efforts targeting this breakthrough.

articles.title: Clinical Trial Proves Peppermint Oil Crushes Blood Pressure — Natural Remedy Big Pharma Can't Patent
articles.summary: UK clinical trial found peppermint oil reduced systolic blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg, rivaling prescription medications. This threatens the multi-billion dollar hypertension drug market with a natural compound that can't be monopolized. Expect medical establishment dismissal despite solid clinical evidence.

articles.title: Psychiatric Industrial Complex Exposed: Serotonin Depression Theory Was Marketing Fiction, Not Science
articles.summary: The serotonin deficiency theory of depression was manufactured by pharmaceutical companies in the late 1980s to sell SSRIs, not discovered through research. A 2022 UCL meta-analysis found zero consistent evidence supporting the chemical imbalance myth that generated hundreds of billions in SSRI sales.

articles.title: Elsevier Retracts SIDS-Vaccine Study to Protect Pharma Profits — Science Censorship in Action
articles.summary: Elsevier retracted Neil Miller's 2021 study linking sudden infant death syndrome to vaccinations, citing concerns it might influence patient care. Translation: scientific evidence that threatens vaccine revenue gets memory-holed. The pharmaceutical industry's capture of academic publishing on full display.

articles.title: Neuroimaging Studies Fail Replication Crisis Test — Independent Validation Exposes Junk Science Epidemic
articles.summary: Nature study reveals that neuroimaging research lacks external validation using independent datasets, undermining generalizability and reproducibility. The replication crisis extends deep into neuroscience, where studies that can't be reproduced continue getting published and cited as gospel.

articles.title: FDA Whistleblower Exposes Agency Cover-Up of Child Deaths from COVID Vaccines
articles.summary: Internal documents reveal FDA officials systematically concealed pediatric deaths linked to COVID vaccines while pushing boosters for children. Agency whistleblowers detail how safety signals were ignored and adverse events were buried to maintain vaccine rollout momentum.

articles.title: Medical Establishment's 'Less Is More' Heresy — When Doing Nothing Beats Big Pharma's Interventions
articles.summary: Evidence mounting that medical restraint often produces better outcomes than aggressive pharmaceutical interventions, challenging the industry's 'treat everything' profit model. The concept that less medicine equals better health threatens core assumptions of modern healthcare's revenue streams.

articles.title: ImmunityBio Stock Crashes 21% After FDA Flags 'Misleading' Cancer Claims — Biotech Fraud Exposed
articles.summary: ImmunityBio faces securities class action after FDA called out allegedly misleading cancer treatment claims, wiping out $2 billion in market cap. The biotech bubble's pattern of overhyped promises and regulatory reality checks continues bilking investors while patients wait for real cures.

articles.title: FDA Covers Up Child Deaths After COVID Vaccines — Internal Documents Exposed
articles.summary: The FDA systematically concealed evidence of pediatric deaths following COVID vaccination, according to internal documents and whistleblower testimony. Agency officials dismissed safety signals and buried adverse event reports to maintain vaccine uptake in children.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Serotonin Lie Exposed — Depression 'Chemical Imbalance' Was Marketing Fiction
articles.summary: The psychiatric industrial complex fabricated the serotonin deficiency theory of depression to sell SSRIs, not from scientific evidence. A 2022 UCL meta-analysis found zero consistent evidence for serotonin imbalances causing depression, exposing decades of pharmaceutical fraud.

articles.title: Elsevier Censors SIDS-Vaccine Study After Industry Pressure — Truth Too Dangerous
articles.summary: Elsevier retracted Neil Miller's peer-reviewed study linking sudden infant death syndrome to vaccinations after pharma backlash. The publisher cited 'patient care concerns' — code for protecting vaccine revenue over infant safety.

articles.summary: Texas A&M researchers developed a nasal spray that reverses brain aging by calming inflammation and restoring cellular energy. Two doses provided months of cognitive improvement, but don't expect pharma investment in non-patentable treatments.

articles.summary: UK clinical trial proves peppermint oil reduces systolic blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg — comparable to prescription drugs without side effects. The medical establishment ignores natural alternatives that threaten pharmaceutical profits.
